name: password
description: Unified password management: generate, get, and store passwords

operation.description: Operation to perform: generate, get, store

name.description: Entry name / label (used for get, store)

value.description: Password value to store (used for store)

vault.description: Vault namespace (used for get, store; default 'default')

charset.description: Character set: alphanumeric, ascii, digits, hex (used for generate; default ascii)
